criteria.name: Ambiguous messages with five active epics select the most recently edited active epic within 24 hours when exactly one qualifying default exists.
Epic selection occurs before `run_turn` lock acquisition, or an explicitly tested safe switch path re-acquires the selected epic lock before any mutation.
Inbound and outbound message rows for a routed real epic are attached to the selected epic rather than left on the synthetic/default Discord conversation key.
When no clear epic context exists, the bot asks a clarification question instead of mutating or responding under a guessed real epic.
Switching from one epic to another includes the destination epic title in the outbound message.
`list_epics`, `search_epics`, and `search_messages` are implemented as Store protocol methods and exposed as tools without bypassing `agent_kit/ports.py`.
SQLite and Supabase store adapters both support `list_epics`, `search_epics`, and `search_messages` with compatible result shapes.
Both SQLite and Supabase migrations add indexed full-text search or the repository's established equivalent for `messages.content`.
`search_messages` returns the expected hit IDs for 10 seeded full-text search queries in the supported store test mode or contract suite.
Reference phrases such as “the second one” and “that point” resolve against the last outbound bot message in at least 9 of 10 unit fixtures.
“show me what you know about X” returns a structured summary containing every section required by `planning-bot-spec.md`.
Mode detection produces distinct response policy inputs for Deep-thinking, Brainstorming, and Executing.
LLM-graded epic-selection eval reaches at least 27 correct out of 30 canned scenarios.
LLM-graded ambiguity eval verifies the bot asks rather than guesses on 10 deliberately ambiguous cases.
Existing repository tests continue to pass after Sprint 3 changes.
Search and selection logic is kept in deterministic modules with focused unit tests rather than embedded only in prompts.
Tool outputs contain enough context for disambiguation without exposing unnecessary internal or cross-user data.
Manual product review confirms the three user modes feel meaningfully different without becoming verbose or performative.

summary: Light robustness: review skipped; stub written for artifact parity.
